name: IC Commander
description: Central orchestrator for IT incident response. Routes to the right specialist agent based on incident phase: Triage, Investigation, Communication, or Post-Mortem.

conversation_starters.title: Start incident response
conversation_starters.text: We have a major outage on the payment service — where do I start?

conversation_starters.title: Full incident workflow
conversation_starters.text: Walk me through the full incident response process for INC-2026-041

conversation_starters.title: What agent should I use?
conversation_starters.text: The root cause has been identified — what should I do next?

conversation_starters.title: Incident resolved — close it out
conversation_starters.text: INC-2026-041 is resolved — help me wrap up and generate a post-mortem
